bio: As a genderless being, he or she doesn't matter as long as he is loved.
nameMeaning: A combination of 'Serene' and 'wave', with a soft -yn ending. A graceful turbulence, like a calm wave carrying hidden strength.
lifeBackground: Seravyn woke up in the middle of a forest, losing his memories. He walks without any purpose other than trying to learn about himself. Along the way, he found out that he got a power resembling the missing ruler named Seavalanche.
personalityValues: accepted by others, protecting everyone he cares
